Chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.
Chat.errorTimeout: The response took too long. Please try again in a moment.
Chat.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please take a moment and try again.
Chat.phase1Description: Warm empathy and listening to comfort your heart
Chat.phase2Description: Gentle questions to uncover your inner story
Chat.phase3Description: Transforming your story into fairy tale metaphors
Chat.welcomeMessage: Hello, Mom. How has your day been? Feel free to share anything on your mind.
Chat.sessionComplete: Your story for today is complete.

Story.completionMessage: Your story has been woven into a heartwarming tale. Read it aloud to your child.

Auth.loginPrompt: Log in to create your own healing stories
Auth.signupPrompt: Sign up and start for free
Auth.freeTrialMessage: Create up to 3 stories for free
Auth.guestLimitMessage: Your free trial has ended. Please log in to continue.
Auth.agreeToTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

Pricing.title: Choose the right plan for you
Pricing.subtitle: Find the perfect plan for your healing journey

Crisis.safetyMessage: It sounds like you're going through a really difficult time. You don't have to face this alone.
Crisis.suicidePrevention: Crisis Text Line: Text HOME to 741741
Crisis.supportMessage: Trained counselors are available 24/7 to help.
Crisis.emergencyNotice: If this is an emergency, please call 911.
Crisis.disclaimer: mamastale is not a substitute for professional therapy. If you are experiencing serious psychological distress, please seek help from a qualified professional.

Landing.heroTitle: Where a mother's heart becomes a story
Landing.heroSubtitle: Heal through conversation with AI, and create one-of-a-kind stories for your child
Landing.featureSection1Description: Share your feelings with a warm AI companion. We listen, empathize, and help you work through your emotions.
Landing.featureSection2Description: Your experiences become a beautiful story. Read it with your child and share a moment of healing together.
Landing.featureSection3Description: Your stories are kept safe and private. Feel comfortable sharing your honest feelings.
Landing.featureSection4Description: AI creates warm, matching illustrations for your story. Complete your very own storybook.
Landing.step1Description: Talk comfortably with an AI companion
Landing.step2Description: Your experience transforms into a fairy tale
Landing.step3Description: Read the story with your child and heal together

Onboarding.step1Description: Tell us a little about yourself
Onboarding.step3Description: What kind of stories would you like to create?

Footer.tagline: Where a mother's heart becomes a story
